sqlMap.select: select * from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into GrossRevenueForFirmLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, GrossRevenueKey YearEndDate Amount LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #GrossRevenueKey:NUMERIC# #YearEndDate# #Amount# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select YearEndDate, Amount, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, GrossRevenueKey from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
sqlMap.update:
update GrossRevenueForFirmLW set
YearEndDate = #YearEndDate# YearEndDate = null Amount = #Amount# Amount = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
delete from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
sqlMap.select: select YearEndDate, Amount, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, GrossRevenueKey from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, GrossRevenueKey, YearEndDate, Amount, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from GrossRevenueForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
